ocr_findings.description: Page header banner 'コレが出る！' rendered as '3しが出る！' — wrong_char substitution on the stylized banner text
Answer key line at page bottom uses '^{}[]' artifacts around spacing between answers (e.g., '問題14-1 イ　^{}[] 問題14-2 エ') — OCR noise from decorative separator elements

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 5 past questions (14-1 to 14-5), each with ア/イ/ウ/エ four-choice format. All answer letters are present and correctly positioned. Question stems, choice text, and bottom answer key are substantially correct. The banner wrong_char and separator artifacts are cosmetic and do not affect answer-letter integrity.
